emergency_routing_rules.fallback: If both fail, ask the caller to leave their address and phone number and assure them a tech will call back within 30 minutes

call_transfer_rules.what_to_say_if_transfer_fails: If both fail, ask the caller to leave their address and phone number and assure them a tech will call back within 30 minutes
call_transfer_rules.transfer_announcement: Please hold while I connect you with our team.

integration_constraints: never schedule weekend jobs through ServiceTrade; those are booked manually
do not create any jobs for gas line work — we're strictly water and drain
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, the agent confirms whether the issue is an emergency. Emergency calls are immediately routed to on-call staff. Non-emergency calls receive a message-taking flow with a next-business-day callback promise.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours (Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday 08:00–17:00 Chicago), calls are answered and routed to the main office or scheduling desk. If transfer fails, a message is taken and callback is promised.
notes: Extracted from demo_call transcript via rule-based engine.
